ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team the player is associated with */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., RB, WR) */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player in inches */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "college" TEXT /* College or university from which the player graduated */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_team" TEXT /* Team that drafted the player */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Pick number in the draft */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cbs_stats" (
  "cbs_stats_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for CBS stats entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "season" INTEGER /* Specific season the statistics are from */,
  "week" INTEGER /* Specific week of the season */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "opponent" TEXT /* Team the player played against */,
  "home_away" TEXT /* Indicates whether the game was played at home or away */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the game */,
  "injury_status" TEXT /* Injury status of the player during the game */,
  "rush_attempts" REAL /* Number of rushing attempts */,
  "rush_yards" REAL /* Total rushing yards */,
  "rush_touchdowns" REAL /* Number of rushing touchdowns */,
  "receptions" REAL /* Total receptions */,
  "rec_yards" REAL /* Total receiving yards */,
  "rec_touchdowns" REAL /* Number of receiving touchdowns */,
  "fantasy_points" REAL /* Fantasy points scored */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cbs_stats_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cbs_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "espn_stats" (
  "espn_stats_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for ESPN stats entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "season" INTEGER /* Specific season the statistics are from */,
  "week" INTEGER /* Specific week of the season */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "opponent" TEXT /* Team the player played against */,
  "home_away" TEXT /* Indicates whether the game was played at home or away */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the game */,
  "injury_status" TEXT /* Injury status of the player during the game */,
  "rush_attempts" REAL /* Number of rushing attempts */,
  "rush_yards" REAL /* Total rushing yards */,
  "rush_touchdowns" REAL /* Number of rushing touchdowns */,
  "receptions" REAL /* Total receptions */,
  "rec_yards" REAL /* Total receiving yards */,
  "rec_touchdowns" REAL /* Number of receiving touchdowns */,
  "fantasy_points" REAL /* Fantasy points scored */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("espn_stats_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_espn_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

  "opponent" TEXT /* Team the player played against */,
  "home_away" TEXT /* Indicates whether the game was played at home or away */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the game */,
  "injury_status" TEXT /* Injury status of the player during the game */,
  "rush_attempts" REAL /* Number of rushing attempts */,
  "rush_yards" REAL /* Total rushing yards */,
  "rush_touchdowns" REAL /* Number of rushing touchdowns */,
  "receptions" REAL /* Total receptions */,
  "rec_yards" REAL /* Total receiving yards */,
  "rec_touchdowns" REAL /* Number of receiving touchdowns */,
  "fantasy_points" REAL /* Fantasy points scored */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ffs_stats_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ffs_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

  "opponent" TEXT /* Team the player played against */,
  "home_away" TEXT /* Indicates whether the game was played at home or away */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the game */,
  "injury_status" TEXT /* Injury status of the player during the game */,
  "rush_attempts" REAL /* Number of rushing attempts */,
  "rush_yards" REAL /* Total rushing yards */,
  "rush_touchdowns" REAL /* Number of rushing touchdowns */,
  "receptions" REAL /* Total receptions */,

CREATE TABLE "numfire_stats" (
  "numfire_stats_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for Numfire stats entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "season" INTEGER /* Specific season the statistics are from */,
  "week" INTEGER /* Specific week of the season */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "opponent" TEXT /* Team the player played against */,
  "home_away" TEXT /* Indicates whether the game was played at home or away */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the game */,
  "injury_status" TEXT /* Injury status of the player during the game */,
  "rush_attempts" REAL /* Number of rushing attempts */,
  "rush_yards" REAL /* Total rushing yards */,
  "rush_touchdowns" REAL /* Number of rushing touchdowns */,
  "receptions" REAL /* Total receptions */,
  "rec_yards" REAL /* Total receiving yards */,
  "rec_touchdowns" REAL /* Number of receiving touchdowns */,
  "fantasy_points" REAL /* Fantasy points scored */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("numfire_stats_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_numfire_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Full name of the team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the team is based */,
  "foundation_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the stadium where the team plays */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the stadium */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, analyst) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player whose data is being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "generated_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "data" TEXT /* Data contained in the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., performance, comparison) */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)
